signals.headline: Ripple USD (RLUSD) Stablecoin Full-Scale Rollout on XRP Ledger and Ethereum | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Ripple USD (RLUSD) Stablecoin Full-Scale Rollout on XRP Ledger and Ethereum | YES | MED confidence**  
Official rollout of RLUSD was announced around April 19, 2026, coinciding with record XRPL transaction volume and XRP ETF approvals nearing final stages, fueling capital inflows[2]. Supporting price predictions highlight RLUSD's role in long-term forecasts up to $10 by 2030[3].

signals.headline: Cavaliers Beat Raptors 115-105 in Game 2, Take 2-0 Series Lead | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Cavaliers Beat Raptors 115-105 in Game 2, Take 2-0 Series Lead | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The Cleveland Cavaliers defeated the Toronto Raptors 115-105 on Monday night (April 20, 2026), securing a 2-0 lead in their Eastern Conference first-round playoff series, with Donovan Mitchell scoring 30 points, James Harden adding 28, and Evan Mobley contributing 25 points and 8 rebounds.[1][2][3][6]
